prompt: A craft coffee pour-over ritual in a sun-drenched cafe. Warm, soft spring morning light streaming through a window, illuminating rising steam and a glass carafe of fresh brewed coffee. Hands holding a ceramic kettle, pouring water over coffee grounds. Shallow depth of field, soft focus, highlighting coffee texture, steam, and amber liquid. The color palette is dominated by espresso brown, warm cream, and copper accents, with a very subtle hint of deep teal in the background. High-craft, authentic, editorial food photography, 35mm film style, natural grain, no artificial gloss, no latte-art cliches.
